zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan d'Anvers於1422年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾時，她的父親John d'Anvers II40歲，母親Joan Bruley23歲。她於大約1446年與Richard Fowler在英國奧可福爾利可特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1505年4月5日在英國奧可福爾坦享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan d'Anvers于1422年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾时，她的父亲John d'Anvers II40岁，母亲Joan Bruley23岁。她于大约1446年与Richard Fowler在英国奧可福爾利可特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1505年4月5日在英国奧可福爾坦享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Anvers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire): of Norman origin, a habitational name with fused preposition d(e) for someone from Anvers, the French name of the port of Antwerp in what is now Belgium.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan d'Anvers was born in 1422, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John d'Anvers II, was 40 and her mother, Joan Bruley, was 23. She married Richard Fowler about 1446, in Rycote, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 5 April 1505, in Thame, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan d'Anvers est née en 1422, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John d'Anvers II, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Joan Bruley, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Fowler environ 1446, à Rycote, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 avril 1505, à Thame, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan d'Anvers 1422 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John d'Anvers II 40 und ihre Mutter Joan Bruley 23. Sie hat um 1446 in Rycote, Oxfordshire, England Richard Fowler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. April 1505 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Thame, Oxfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan d'Anvers è nata il nel 1422 nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John d'Anvers II, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Joan Bruley, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Richard Fowler circa 1446, nel Rycote, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 5 aprile 1505, nel Thame, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan d'Anversが1422年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父John d'Anvers IIは40歳，母Joan Bruleyは23歳であった。約1446年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアリコトでRichard Fowlerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1505年4月5日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアサムで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan d'Anvers(이)가 1422년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John d'Anvers II(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Bruley(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1446년 영국 스퍼드실르 리컷에서 Richard Fowler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1505년 4월 5일 영국 스퍼드실르 섬에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan d'Anvers nasceu em 1422, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John d'Anvers II, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Joan Bruley, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Fowler aproximadamente 1446, em Rycote, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de abril de 1505, em Thame, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan d'Anvers родилась в 1422 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John d'Anvers II было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Bruley, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Fowler около 1446 г. в местности рикот, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 5 апреля 1505 г. в местности там, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan d'Anvers nació en 1422, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John d'Anvers II, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Joan Bruley, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Richard Fowler aproximadamente 1446, en Rycote, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 5 de abril de 1505, en Thame, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 83 años.
